data.title: Apple's 24-Year 70,000% Climb Since iTunes Faces 2025 Test
data.description: Jan. 9, 2001: Steve Jobs unveils iTunes, changing music storage and playback. The launch also set the stage for Apple's dominance in consumer tech.

data.title: Nvidia and AI Chip Stocks Brace for Impact as Biden Administration Considers New China Export Ban: Report
data.description: Biden may impose new sanctions on AI chip exports to China, limiting sales to allies like Germany and Japan. US companies can apply for exceptions.

data.title: British Retail Giant Marks & Spencer Warns Of Economic Challenges Despite Strong Sales Growth In Food And Retail
data.description: Marks and Spencer Group reported a 5.6% increase in sales, reaching £4.06 billion for the 13-week period ending Dec. 28. Despite this, the company warned of economic uncertainties, including inflation and rising tax costs.

data.title: Mercedes-Benz Expands In India With New Outlets To Tap Growing Luxury Market: Report
data.description: Mercedes has observed higher demand for premium and electric vehicles in cities like Kanpur and Patna, where infrastructure like stand-alone homes supports easier EV charging.

data.title: Price Over Earnings Overview: Archer-Daniels Midland
